message:
feat(mobile): add isTouchUi breakpoint and improve tablet form inputs

App.tsx:
- Add new BREAKPOINT_TOUCH_UI_PX (900px) for tablets and large phones
- Add isTouchUi to layout state alongside isMobile/isNarrow/isWide
- Subscribe to matchMedia for touch UI breakpoint changes
- FAB and action drawer now render for all touch UI devices (≤900px),
  not just phones (≤640px) — tablets benefit from floating action button
- SwipeIndicators remain phone-only (≤640px) since tablets have
  more screen real estate for other navigation

components.css:
- Split media queries: phone-specific (≤640px) vs tablet-friendly (≤768px)
- Metrics grid 2-column layout now applies at ≤768px (tablets too)
- Settings row column layout now applies at ≤768px (tablets too)

mobile-ux.css:
- Add min-height 45px for input, select, textarea on touch devices
- Ensures form inputs meet WCAG 2.1 SC 2.5.5 touch target requirements
- Applied at both @media hover:none and max-width 640px breakpoints

styles.css:
- Minor formatting cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
